3.name: Crowded Vials
3.description: Advanced battles may add one extra modifier.

4.name: Quickened Hate
4.description: Elite attack countdowns begin 1 move sooner.

7.name: Cursed Draft
7.description: The first reward choice carries a curse risk.

8.name: Relentless
8.description: Boss phase attacks deal 2 additional damage.

9.name: Fractured Flask
9.description: One filled layer may begin hidden in late battles.

10.name: Sovereign Crucible
10.description: All enemies gain 12% HP and 2 attack damage.
